title: God's Country
writer: Robert Emmett Tansey, James Oliver Curwood, Frances Kavanaugh
actors: Robert Lowery, Helen Gilbert, William Farnum
plot: Lee Preston, aka Leland Bruce (Robert Lowery), kills a man in self defense but flees to the redwood country when the law makes it a murder charge. There he meets Lynn O'Malley (Helen Gilbert, the niece of "Sandy" McTavish (William...
